kw.name: Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.name: Reply By
kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.name: Get Request Body
kw.doc: Returns body of received request as a string. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.name: Get Request Headers
kw.doc: Returns headers of received request as a dictionary. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Convert To Dictionary
kw.doc: Converts the given ``item`` to a Python ``dict`` type.

kw.name: Output Notification
kw.doc: *Body and headers of the notification are output to terminal and file (in JSON).* :param body: body of the notification received :param headers: headers of the notification received :param description: explains what request is being made :param console: If false, the JSON is not written to terminal. Default is true.

kw.name: Wait for CSource notification and validate it
Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.doc: Returns body of received request as a string. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.doc: Returns headers of received request as a dictionary. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.name: Wait For No Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait for no incoming request during specific time. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives or timeout. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For No Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns throws exception. Otherwise it waits for request during 'timeout' seconds. If during this time request is received then exception is thrown.

kw.doc: Command to server to wait for no incoming request during specific time. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives or timeout. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For No Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns throws exception. Otherwise it waits for request during 'timeout' seconds. If during this time request is received then exception is thrown.

kw.name: Wait for CSource notification and validate it
Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.name: Reply By
kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.name: Get Request Body
kw.doc: Returns body of received request as a string. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.name: Get Request Headers
kw.doc: Returns headers of received request as a dictionary. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Wait for CSource notification and validate it
Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.name: Reply By
kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.name: Wait for CSource notification and validate it
Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.msg: Push response to the Response Storage: 200
kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.name: Wait for CSource notification and validate it
Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.doc: Returns body of received request as a string. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.name: Wait for CSource notification and validate it
Wait For Request
kw.doc: Command to server to wait incoming request. This call is blocked until HTTP request arrives. Basically server receives all requests after \`Start Server\` and places them to internal queue. When test call function \`Wait For Request\` it checks the queue and if it is not empty returns the first request in the queue. If the queue is empty then function waits when the server receives request and place it to the queue. There is default time period '5 seconds' to wait request and this waiting time can be changed. If during wait time the request is not received then timeout error occurs.

kw.name: Reply By
kw.msg: Push response to the Response Storage: 200
kw.doc: Send response using specified HTTP code and body. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`.

kw.name: Get Request Body
kw.doc: Returns body of received request as a string. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.

kw.doc: Returns headers of received request as a dictionary. This function should be called after \`Wait For Request\`, otherwise None is returned.
